positive: A vibrant, stylized mountain range silhouette against a gradient sunrise background. The mountains are represented by crisp, geometric peaks and flowing, ethereal lines, emphasizing a feeling of adventure and tranquility. Incorporated into the foreground are abstract, minimalist elements like stylized flowing river patterns and clusters of simple, geometric flora. The overall composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a t-shirt print. Use a highly contrasting, limited color palette of deep indigo, warm ochre, coral pink, and creamy white. Focus on clean lines, flat vector graphic aesthetics, and strong contrast suitable for screen printing. Cinematic, high detail, perfect symmetry, matte finish.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademark, copyright, noisy, bad anatomy, low resolution, grayscale, gradient noise, complex shading, photorealistic, messy, sketch, graffiti, extra limbs
